title: Add Upload Files input field in Actions for Workflow Blocks

posts.author: lanyere (Yerlan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Many marketplace applications use workflows to send messages, emails, or tickets that need a Files input field.

Currently, Monday does not support an input field for uploading a file from a computer or choosing an already uploaded file from the Files Gallery. This feature would be very useful for users sending messages from Monday to other platforms.

If this feature is planned, please notify us here or by email. Thanks in advance!
